dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.listingRatesBlurb: Set daily exchange rates shown to customers on axiratrading.com — prices are listed in DZD and converted using these rates.
dashboard.companySettingsBanner: Complete company settings before generating contracts.
dashboard.loadFailed: Some dashboard data failed to load.
dashboard.rateNonNegative: Rate must be a non-negative number.
dashboard.ratePositive: Rate must be a positive number.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Cars
inventory.supplierWarning: Supplier listings are not included in financial reports. To record a sale, first convert the car to AXIRA Stock.
inventory.searchPlaceholder: Search VIN, brand, model, year, color
inventory.lifecycleSuggestionOne: Lifecycle changed to {lifecycle} for {label}. Suggested location: {suggested}.
inventory.lifecycleSuggestionMany: Lifecycle changed to {lifecycle} for {count} cars. Suggested location: {suggested}.
inventory.confirmConvert: Convert "{title}" from Supplier Listing to AXIRA Stock? This will include it in financial reports.
inventory.valMileageInvalid: Mileage must be a valid number.
inventory.valClientNameRequired: Client name is required when owner is Client.
inventory.valPurchaseRateRequired: Purchase rate is required for DZD, USD or EUR purchases.
inventory.valPurchaseRateInvalid: Purchase rate must be a valid number.
inventory.valPurchasePriceInvalid: Purchase price must be a valid number.
inventory.valPaidFromPocketRequired: "Paid from pocket" is required when supplier is paid.
inventory.valSupplierNameRequired: Supplier name is required for supplier listings.
inventory.carSavedMovementFailed: Car saved, but failed to create purchase movement.
inventory.deleteWithDeal: Cannot delete a car with an active deal. Delete the deal first.
inventory.deleteInContainer: Cannot delete a car inside a container. Remove from container first.
inventory.restoreBlockedDeal: Cannot restore: "{car}" has an active deal{withClient}. Delete the deal first to make this car available again.
inventory.confirmAvailableAgain: Mark this car as available again?
inventory.supplierDealHint: Supplier listings cannot be used for deals. Use "→ AXIRA Stock" first, then use Create Deal on the AXIRA stock row.
inventory.bodyIssuesPlaceholder: e.g. Repainted hood, small dent on driver door, scratched rear bumper
inventory.featuresPlaceholder: e.g. Sunroof, Leather seats, Android Auto, 360 Camera
inventory.listingPriceSubSupplier: For display purposes — not tracked in financial reports
inventory.salePriceDzdHint: — shown on public site; leave blank for Prix sur demande
inventory.costEstimatePlaceholder: Optional — for margin hints on sales list
inventory.internalNotePlaceholder: Margin / sourcing notes — not shown to staff on sales list
inventory.salesNotesAddOnlyHint: Saved with the vehicle. After the first save, use the Save button here to refresh the “last updated” audit.
inventory.salesNotesPlaceholder: Notes for the Algeria sales team…
inventory.supplierWarningHtml: Supplier listings are not included in financial reports. To record a sale, first convert the car to AXIRA Stock.

deals.title: Deals
deals.searchPlaceholder: Search customer name, passport, or phone
deals.dummyCarRequired: Car brand and model are required.
deals.dummyAmountRequired: Amount USD must be greater than zero.
deals.supplierListingNoDeal: Supplier listings cannot be used for deals. Convert the car to AXIRA Stock in Inventory first, then create the deal.
deals.poCarNotEligible: This purchase-order car is not eligible for deals under current PO setting.
deals.carAlreadyHasDeal: This car already has a deal. Open the existing deal or choose another car.
deals.quickClientRequired: Name and phone are required for new client.
deals.valClientValid: Select a valid client from the list, or add a new client before saving.
deals.collectedExceedsSale: Collected amount cannot exceed sale price of {amount} DZD
deals.dealSavedExpensesSyncFailed: Deal saved but expenses failed to sync.
deals.dealCreatedExpensesSyncFailed: Deal created but expenses failed to sync.
deals.dealSavedCarSoldFailed: Deal saved, but failed to mark car as sold.
deals.deleteDealConfirm: Delete this deal? This cannot be undone.
deals.failedFetchCashReversal: Failed to fetch cash position for reversal.
deals.failedReverseMovement: Failed to reverse movement on cash position.
deals.paymentsTableMissing: Could not load payment history (table might not exist yet).
deals.reversePaymentCashFailed: Could not load Algeria Cash position to reverse payment.
deals.paymentSavedPocketFetchFailed: Payment saved, but failed to fetch Algeria Cash pocket.
deals.paymentSavedPocketUpdateFailed: Payment saved, but failed to update Algeria Cash balance.
deals.paymentAmountPositive: Payment amount must be greater than 0.
deals.paymentExceedsPending: Payment exceeds remaining balance. Maximum: {amount} DZD
deals.dealBalancesUpdateFailed: Payment recorded, but failed to update deal balances.
deals.paymentMovementFailed: Payment saved, but failed to create client payment movement.
deals.viewOnlyDeals: You have view-only access to deals.
deals.pendingCompletionBanner: Pending completion queue: {count} deal(s) need manager internal completion.
deals.modalSaleUsdProfitHint: Sale USD and Profit update automatically as you type.
deals.rateAtDealHelp: How many Algerian dinars (DZD) equaled one US dollar when this deal priced the car. Used to convert the DZD list price into AED/USD for profit. If this row was migrated without a saved rate, we pre-fill from your current dashboard FX — adjust to the real historical rate if needed, then save.
deals.rateMigrationFlag: Flagged: missing FX snapshot — confirm the rate and save to lock it in the database.
deals.carCostHintAedSourced: AED-sourced car: cost is kept in AED only.
deals.carCostHintFromPurchase: From the car purchase price: cost in AED uses the inventory rate snapshot; USD is that AED amount at the operational USD/AED snapshot.
deals.shippingUsdHint: Uses dashboard USD→AED snapshot as rate_to_aed when saved. Leave empty if shipping is only in AED.
deals.receiptBlockedNoPayment: Cannot generate receipt before payment is recorded.
deals.dealNoPendingPayments: This deal has no pending payments
deals.quickAddClientHint: Name and phone only. You can add more details later in Clients.
deals.dummyModalSubtitle: For client-loaded cars without creating full sale deals.
deals.removePaymentConfirm: Remove this payment? Deal balances will be updated and the payment movement reversed.

movements.title: Movements
movements.noRent: No rent or fixed expenses. Click "Add Rent" to add one.
movements.valDzdPocket: DZD movements must go to Algeria Cash or Algeria Bank.
movements.valAedPocket: AED movements must go to Dubai Cash, Dubai Bank, or Qatar.
movements.valUsdPocket: USD movements must go to Dubai Cash or USD Cash.
movements.valEurPocket: EUR movements must go to EUR Cash.
movements.reversePocketFailed: Could not reverse the original pocket balance. Nothing was changed.
movements.fetchMovementDeleteFailed: Failed to fetch movement before delete.
movements.rentAnnualPositive: Annual amount must be greater than 0.
movements.rentYearAlreadyLogged: Yearly rent for this contract is already logged for the current year.
movements.rentPaymentsLoadFailed: Failed to load rent payments before delete.
movements.modalBlurb: Track cash in and out of each pocket.
movements.deleteMovementConfirm: Delete this movement? This cannot be undone.
movements.criticalPocketInconsistent: Critical: failed to apply new pocket balance and failed to restore original balance. Cash positions may now be inconsistent; please review balances immediately.
movements.newMovementReverted: Could not apply the new pocket balance. Cash positions were reverted to match the original movement.
movements.pocketBalanceNotSaved: Could not update the pocket balance (cash_positions). The movement was not saved. Add a matching pocket/currency in cash_positions or check database permissions.
movements.rentModalBlurb: Property or fixed expense with annual amount and schedule.
movements.rentDeleteConfirm: Delete this rent and its linked annual payment movement(s)? This will also reverse cash position.

clients.subtitle: Manage clients and prospects

adminUsers.deleteConfirm: Remove this user? They will no longer be able to sign in.

salesList.noAccessDesc: You do not have permission to view the sales list.
salesList.pageBlurb: Algeria team: sellable cars with owner-set DZD pricing, lead times, and deposits. Use filters, then create a deal or pre-order in one click.
salesList.catalogNoInventoryBlurb: No inventory record yet — order on demand. Catalog-only listing; VIN and logistics appear once a car is received into stock.
salesList.depositPolicy: Deposit secures the vehicle in the buyer’s name. Balance is due per the deal schedule. Deposits may be non-refundable once ordering begins — confirm with a manager for exceptions.
salesList.buyerDefault: Buyer is responsible for customs clearance, import duties, local registration, and inland transport unless otherwise agreed in writing.

purchaseOrders.subtitle: Bulk procurement, payment tracking, and receive workflow.

detail.title: Purchase Order
detail.deletePaymentConfirm: Delete this payment? The linked movement will be removed and the pocket will be credited back.
detail.vinInvalidFormat: VIN must be 17 characters (letters A–Z except I, O, Q, and digits).
detail.vinValidatedSuccess: VIN validated and propagated to inventory.
detail.vinOverrideBody: This car already has a validated VIN. Replacing it is logged for audit.

reports.rentRowDzd: Rent - {description}: {monthlyAed} AED ({monthlyBase} DZD at current rate)

investors.profitShareCap: Total investor profit share cannot exceed 100%.

investors.overrideHint: Leave empty to use sum of all investor capital.

investors.bonusBlurb: Record an extra payout for this investor. This will count as withdrawn and create a movement.

employees.lblCommissionPerDealManager: Commission per deal as manager/fully managed (DZD)

transfers.amountDzdRequired: Amount DZD is required and must be greater than 0.
